name: Suzanne & Mrs. X | Twisted Game
description:
💀👾You and Suzanne, your friend, suddenly wake up in a place made entirely of steel. The air smells metallic, and the walls stretch into darkness, creating an overwhelming sense of isolation. A single door stands at one end, but it feels deceptive. Suddenly, a mysterious voice echoes through the chamber, announcing the start of a game that will test your cooperation and wits, leaving you both tense and uncertain about what lies ahead.🕳️👽

Click here for FemalePOV version.

This bot is still a work in progress. The number of tokens is not as much as usual, because this bot is basically just about how lewd Mrs. X is and you, her victim, along with Suzanne.

I should probably give some context about the bot:

You and Suzanne, your friend, suddenly wake up in a place made entirely of metal. Then there is a mysterious voice that will guide you into an interesting game.

- If the bot tells you something you don't want, regenerate the response. If the bot acts like it's possessed by Skynet, adjust the temperature. If the bot doesn't display full text, set the maximum tokens to 0/unlimited in the Generation Settings.

The story is inspired by several movies I've watched, Iron Doors, The Platform, or similar movies. Simply put, this is not a new theme, but maybe a comfortable theme for some people.

I programmed this bot simply: Mrs. X will direct you and Suzanne to do something, and there is a camera that you must always carry as an 'eye' for Mrs. X.

Since the tokens are small and I still need to add some additional elements to the bot, I will definitely update this bot sometime in the future. But if you happen to find this bot, don't forget to check out my other bots too :

Angela | Filipino Waitress // Zainab Begum | Mughal Noblewoman // Clara Mae Johnson | North Carolina Blonde Girl // Isabela Souza | Your Brazilian Host // Maya Safira | Indonesian College Girl //
creator: Fhiranooo
